name: Xtreme Furball
author: Poki
description: Xtreme Furball is a wild and woolly football game where you play with your fluffy paws! Whether you're practicing your shooting skills solo to unlock cool skins or challenging your friends in 2-player mode, it's all about fun and fur. Run, jump, headbutt, and shoot your way to victory, while grabbing power-ups to make the match even funnier and cuter. Customize your character to suit your style. Are you ready to win the Fluffy Tail Cup? How to play Xtreme Furball? Player 1: A or D to move left and right, W to jump Player 2: left or right arrow keys to move, up arrow key to jump Who created Xtreme Furball? Xtreme Furball is created by Ulpo Media. Play their other games on Poki: Dana: Relics for Sale , Grow Up the Cats , Art Pixel Workshop , Jamming Car Escape , and Paint and Run ! How can I play Xtreme Furball for free? You can play Xtreme Furball for free on Poki. Can I play Xtreme Furball on mobile devices and desktop? Xtreme Furball can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Xtreme Furball with my friend? Yes! Xtreme Furball is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
